title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY / Tel Aviv HQ collaboration
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by brands like The NYT and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, the role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and the ability to collaborate across time zones with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Excellent match on all core criteria: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, deep B2B SaaS and fintech expertise, RevOps/GTM focus, and experience scaling beyond $30M ARR. Tel Aviv HQ collaboration aligns perfectly with target location flexibility.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Finout is scaling its GTM operations with a Head of RevOps role—and given your 15+ years building revenue infrastructure in high-growth B2B SaaS companies and your Tel Aviv roots, this feels like a natural fit. Your experience scaling Salesforce operations and pipeline forecasting across time zones would directly address their challenge of connecting NY growth with Tel Aviv HQ leadership. I'd love to explore whether this aligns with what you're looking for next.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Cyngn is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to lead GTM analytics and systems. The role requires 8+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or a similar GTM analytics role in B2B SaaS or enterprise software, with strong backgrounds in data analytics, forecasting, funnel modeling, and KPIs. Candidates should be process builders able to translate business goals into scalable dashboards and processes, working cross-functionally with sales, marketing, finance, and product. Robotics/IoT experience is a plus.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, expertise in pipeline forecasting, CAC/LTV analysis, and process-driven GTM systems align perfectly with Cyngn's need for a data-driven Head of RevOps. The remote structure and enterprise software focus are ideal matches, though lack of robotics/IoT background is a minor gap.
ai_opener: Cyngn's mission to scale autonomous operations through data-driven GTM caught my attention—particularly your focus on building predictive analytics and scalable revenue systems. With 15+ years building RevOps from the ground up at B2B SaaS companies, I've spent the last decade architecting the exact kind of cross-functional forecasting and KPI frameworks your team needs to accelerate from where you are now.

title: RevOps Manager

ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue infrastructure at B2B SaaS companies, and Instrumentl's mission to scale nonprofit funding resonates. Your need for someone to architect CRM data models and lead AI tool implementation across sales is exactly the kind of technical RevOps work I've thrived on—I'd love to explore how I can help you transform Instrumentl's revenue engine.
